analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard 5e language for racial/class features that grant a language.
analysis.quality: High quality. Clear description of benefit (knowledge of a language), usage (speaking, hidden messages), and countermeasures (detection DC and deciphering requirement).

mechanics.rules_implication: Grants proficiency in the Druidic language. Specifically details how hidden messages in Druidic are handled: Easy for initiates (no check), difficult for outsiders (DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) to notice the presence, magic required to understand).
mechanics.balance: Mechanically minor, as it only affects roleplaying and information sharing among druids, which is appropriate for a core class feature.
